texto: But we had ceased to hate. Belsen had some way cured us of all hate, at least all hate of any human creature. We had learned what evil there is in the world or beyond the world, what happens to a man or a group of men-call them a nation if you will- when they have given themselves over to the powers of evil, when they have denied the Christ.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Collis sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “But we had ceased to hate. Belsen had some way cured us of all hate, at least all hate of any hum…” articula sabedoria, christ, evil-men em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como evil-men.
